title: Monarch Solutions
summary: The named contractor said to run a deep underground base beneath Toronto — the timeline war's corporate branch office.
markdown:
**Monarch Solutions** is the archive's corporate villain: a named organization the 2020
Lusterkill-era interviews place at the intersection of underground infrastructure and
timeline manipulation. The sessions say it operates *"a huge DUMB"* — a deep underground
military base — **beneath Toronto, Canada**, tied to the era's "Time Bubble" claims: local
manipulations of time run as a business line.

The name does a lot of quiet work in the record's world. Where the
[Nazi faction](/lore/nazi-faction/) supplies the archive's dynasties and
[DARPA](/lore/darpa/) its laboratories, Monarch Solutions supplies the **contractor layer** —
the deniable, invoiced middle where the [Secret Space Program's](/lore/secret-space-program/)
technology meets civilian geography. A base under a G7 city, run not by a government but by a
company, is exactly the shape of power the sessions keep describing: the
[control network](/lore/problem-reaction-solution/) as an org chart rather than a throne.

Two sessions, one named firm, one named city — a small entry, but a load-bearing one for how
the record thinks: everything has an operator, and the operator has a name. Preserved as
spoken, and — as with everything in this archive — not independently verified.
